name: Five Minute Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 package chocolate chips - 12 oz (semi-sweet or milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the condensed milk and chocolate chips in a saucepan until melted, stirring occasionally.
- Remove from heat and stir in the nuts.
- Pour into an 8-inch square pan sprayed with Pam.
2. Let cool at room temperature for 30 minutes, then refrigerate.
3. Cut after 2 hours.
